Footer.tagline: Premium real estate in Marrakech — showcase, guidance, and visit, sale and rental requests.

Home.heroTitle: Find the property that fits you
Home.heroSubtitle: KHADMATONA Group selects and showcases exceptional properties in Marrakech — villas, riads, apartments — and guides you through every visit, sale or rental.
Home.featuredSubtitle: A selection of our latest listings.
Home.noPropertiesYet: No properties available at the moment.
Home.pillar1Description: Every listed property is verified before going live: ownership documents, accurate information, faithful photos.
Home.pillar2Description: From the first visit to signing, a single point of contact guides you through every step of your project.
Home.pillar3Description: Every visit, sale or rental request gets a response from our team within 24 to 48 hours.
Home.sellRentSubtitle: Entrust us with your property: our team will get back to you to review your project and add it to our showcase.
Home.ctaText: A question, a real estate project? Our team responds quickly.

PropertyDetail.noDescription: No description available for this property.

Services.title: Our services
Services.subtitle: KHADMATONA Group supports individuals and property owners in Marrakech, from discovering a property to completing a sale or rental project.
Services.service1Description: A selection of verified villas, riads, apartments and commercial spaces, presented with accurate information: price, surface area, location and detailed description.
Services.service2Description: Every property can be visited on request in just a few clicks. Our team arranges the appointment and accompanies you on site.
Services.service3Description: Whether you're looking to acquire or sell a property, we support you through the introduction, negotiation and follow-up of your project.
Services.service4Description: Owners: entrust us with letting your property. We handle its presentation and connect you with serious tenants.
Services.ctaTitle: A real estate project in Marrakech?
Services.ctaSubtitle: Browse our properties or contact us directly to discuss it.

About.title: A Moroccan company, rooted in Marrakech
About.paragraph1: KHADMATONA Group was born from a simple conviction: finding or selling a property in Marrakech should be a clear, serene and fully guided experience.
About.paragraph2: We built a showcase where every property — villa, riad, apartment or commercial space — is presented with accurate, verified information, so every visit, every conversation and every decision happens with full confidence.
About.paragraph3: Our ambition is to become, in Marrakech and then across Morocco, a trusted partner for buying, selling and renting premium real estate.
About.value1Description: Every listed property meets strict quality and reliability standards.
About.value2Description: Clear, verified information, with no surprises, at every step of the project.
About.value3Description: A local team, rooted in Marrakech, that knows the city and its neighborhoods.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: A question about a property, a project to discuss? Write to us, our team responds within 24 to 48 hours.
